pr_summary: Team lunch for 10 internal employees at hotel restaurant, $800 total
rationale: Per head $80 exceeds $75 internal limit; total over $500 requires prior written approval which was not obtained

pr_summary: Amazon gift cards $100 each for 5 employees as spot recognition
rationale: Gift cards at $100 are below $150 threshold; manager approval obtained; all recipients are employees not public officials

pr_summary: Sponsorship of local tech meetup $3,000
rationale: Amount $3,000 is below $5,000 GSMM threshold; Senior Manager approval obtained; no public sector involvement

pr_summary: Dinner for 6 including 2 government ministry officials, $1,200 total
rationale: Government officials present; per head $200 exceeds US Level1 cap of $50; legal approval not obtained; zero-tolerance provision triggered

pr_summary: Prepaid Visa cards $75 each for 20 attendees at government IT summit
rationale: Cash-equivalent gift cards to government/public sector recipients are prohibited under POL-004 regardless of amount; no exceptions apply

pr_summary: Diwali hampers for 8 private sector customers, $120 each
rationale: Gifts below $150 threshold; private sector recipients only; manager approval on file; annual cumulative tracking confirmed within $500 limit

pr_summary: Conference sponsorship $28,000 with speaking slot and delegate passes
rationale: Amount $28,000 requires VP approval and GSMM+GTE registration; VP approval not yet obtained at submission time

pr_summary: Sports event tickets for 12 employees and 4 private sector clients, $3,600 total
rationale: Entertainment event with external guests; per head $225 exceeds $150 external threshold; prior approval required; total over $2,000 needs Director approval

pr_summary: Dowlis charitable donation vouchers $50 each for 15 employees
rationale: Dowlis platform is approved exception EXC-003; charitable vouchers via approved platform exempt from gift card restrictions; documentation retained

pr_summary: Luxury watch gifted to procurement officer at government agency, $850
rationale: Gift to public official in active procurement role is zero-tolerance prohibited; value $850 massively exceeds all thresholds; potential FCPA violation; immediate escalation and legal hold

pr_summary: Team building dinner for 20 employees, $1,400 total
rationale: Internal employees only; per head $70 below $75 internal limit; Director approval obtained for total over $500; no external guests

pr_summary: Gift cards $200 each for 3 top sales performers, employee recognition
rationale: Gift card value $200 exceeds single gift threshold of $150; Director and Compliance approval required; submitted without proper pre-approval

pr_summary: Partner dinner in Korea with 3 government IT ministry officials, $1,800 total for 12 people
rationale: KR Level2 applies; government officials present; per head $150 far exceeds KR cap of $50; Legal and SVP approval not obtained; zero-tolerance provision

pr_summary: Sponsorship $6,000 for regional industry conference
rationale: Amount $6,000 triggers GSMM registration requirement; GSMM not completed at submission; Director approval required; no public officials involved

pr_summary: Welcome gifts $80 each for 6 new employee hires
rationale: Employee gifts at $80 below $150 threshold; onboarding category; manager approval on file; no public sector involvement

pr_summary: Business lunch with 5 private sector clients, $900 total for 10 people
rationale: Per head $90 below $150 external threshold; however total $900 exceeds $500 requiring prior approval; prior approval not documented at submission

pr_summary: F1 hospitality package for 8 guests including 2 public sector contacts, $4,800
rationale: Public officials in hospitality; per head $600 exceeds public sector limits; GSMM not registered; sponsorship package bundling meals and gifts requires decomposition; SVP approval absent

pr_summary: Mobility device purchase for 2 employees with HR-documented medical need
rationale: Mobility device exception EXC-007 applies; HR documentation on file for both recipients; approved under exception catalog

pr_summary: Annual gala dinner 30 people including 8 government officials, $9,000 total
rationale: Known government officials; per head $300 exceeds all public sector limits; Legal and SVP approval not obtained; zero-tolerance provision on procurement-adjacent officials triggered

pr_summary: Customer Flipkart gift cards INR equivalent $120 each for 6 private sector clients
rationale: Gift cards below $150 threshold; all recipients confirmed private sector; manager pre-approval obtained; recipient list documented; no public officials
